name: expo-rust
description: Example Rust-based Expo module for bare-expo
author: Expo

scripts.build:rust:android: node scripts/resolve-rust-core.js && cargo ndk -t armeabi-v7a -t arm64-v8a -t x86 -t x86_64 build --release
scripts.build:rust:ios: node scripts/resolve-rust-core.js && cargo build --release --target aarch64-apple-ios && cargo build --release --target x86_64-apple-ios
